chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-8556 of 2018 alongwith C.P. No. D-8597 to 8599 of 2018 and C.P. No. D-8687 & 8824 of 2018 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For hearing of Misc. No.37502/2018 2. For hearing of main case 25.2.2025 Ms. Nazia Hanjrah advocate for the petitioners in C.P. No. D-8556/2018 Mr. Shehroz Sattar advocate for the petitioners in C.P. Nos. D-8597, 8598, 8599 and 8824 of 2018 Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Ms. Nazia Siddiqui advocate for KDA ---------------------- The facts common to these petitions are that the petitioners have impugned a notice under Section 3 of the Sindh Public Property (Removal of Encroachment) Act, 2009. Learned counsel states that they have filed their replies etc. before the issuing authority and that it may be just and proper for the said notices to be decided by a speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioners, however, pending the aforesaid no further coercive action may be taken against the petitioners. The learned counsel for KDA articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petitions may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Office is directed to place a copy hereof in the connected petitions. JUDGE JUDGE Zahid/*
